about.en: Injective is a layer 1 blockchain built for decentralized finance applications, including exchanges, derivatives, prediction markets, and other financial protocols. INJ is the native asset used for staking, governance, fees, and ecosystem incentives. The network is designed around fast finality and interoperable DeFi infrastructure.
about.es: Injective es una blockchain de capa 1 creada para aplicaciones de finanzas descentralizadas, incluidos exchanges, derivados, mercados de prediccion y otros protocolos financieros. INJ es el activo nativo utilizado para staking, gobernanza, comisiones e incentivos del ecosistema. La red esta disenada alrededor de finalidad rapida e infraestructura DeFi interoperable.
about.ca: Injective es una blockchain de capa 1 creada per a aplicacions de finances descentralitzades, inclosos exchanges, derivats, mercats de prediccio i altres protocols financers. INJ es l actiu natiu utilitzat per a staking, governanca, comissions i incentius de l ecosistema. La xarxa esta dissenyada al voltant de finalitat rapida i infraestructura DeFi interoperable.
